ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Voorsanger for and with Leona Lee and Sandra Roorda (Co-Executors). Donald Murray appeared by phone.

Court received additional declarations and memorandam of points filed this morning by Mr. Murray. Mr. Murray, his daughter and Mr. Voorsanger presented oral argument to support their positions. The First Account and Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (5435 Anza Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Voorsanger for and with Leona Lee and Sandra Roorda (Co-Executors).

The sale was confirmed at $754,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.
